notes: 2016 RCT; compares 4x4 HIIT vs 1x10 HIIT vs MICT in 30 overweight adults; 4x4 HIIT superior for VO2max (+10% vs +3.3%); good methodology but small sample
Article is about surgical management of spinal deformity/radiculopathy — completely unrelated to HIIT
2025 narrative review of HIIT and cardiovascular health; covers mechanisms (mitochondrial biogenesis, NO bioavailability, endothelial function), safety data, longevity associations

2025 systematic review and meta-analysis in older adults (≥60 yrs, 29 trials, 1227 subjects); HIIT shows significant VO2max gains vs MICT in controlled trials; broadly positive for cardiometabolic health
2023 meta-analysis of 97 RCTs, 3399 participants; HIIT effective for cardiometabolic risk factors; supports inclusion in physical activity guidelines
